title: Indian smartphone market shipments fell 13% in Q2 according to Omdia
summary: A few days ago Counterpoint Research released its report on the Indian smartphone market for the second quarter of this year (April to June), and now Omdia has done the same. According to Omdia's data, the overall smartphone shipments in India fell by 13% in Q2 compared to the same period last year…

title: Nintendo keeps making shooters more friendly and approachable
summary: Nintendo does a lot of weird things, but Splatoon might just be one of the strangest - or at least the boldest. The series started as an attempt to muscle into the ultra-competitive online shooter space, but in a way that feels a world away from the violence and bombast of Call of Duty or Battlefie…

title: Samsung creates Robotics eXperience (RX) division
summary: Samsung Electronics has established a Robotics eXperience (RX) Business Promotion Office that will be led by CEO TM Roh. This division will consolidate Samsung’s existing robotic research and development efforts. Lee Dong-geon, who previously led robot strategies for Boston Dynamics while he was at…
